raw_lines: Arrive at Da Nang, Zen Boutique Eco will pick up on arrivals platform | Da Nang is where Shane lived (53 Tan Da, Danang)! A mix of North & South. | 20.0

Zen Boutique Eco | 87 Ly Thuong Kiet, Cam Chau, Hoi An, Vietnam | booked for night of 10 & 11 | phone +84 90 673 71 45 | Booking: Confirmation: 5331628842
PIN: 6633 (Confidential)
Scooter ride - countryside loop | can do by self. easiest & calmest (rice paddies, water buffalo, tiny lanes)
scooter ride to Hai Van Pass | dramatic ocean cliffs between Hue & Da Nang, 90 min should get a guide, sketchy | $45-80/pp | MotorVina Travel or Hue Riders / Original Easy Riders
Countryside Bicycle Ride | Sunrise or late afternoon (see Water buffalo, small farms, vegetable gardens, Rice Paddies + Tra Que Village)
vegetarian cooking class | could do one with a boat ride and market visit
Old Town at Night (Lantern Walk) | Walk from the Japanese Bridge to the riverfront
Some history of hoi an show that happens at night
Chay Dam – Vegetarian Restaurant (Dam Tra Que) | Farm to table, beautiful garden setting in Tra Que Vegetable Village
Annen Vegetarian & Yoga | Zen aesthetic, yoga classes + vegetarian café
Nourish Eatery | International + Vietnamese fusion, brunch/lunch spot
CHAY – Hoi An Vegan Restaurant | Most fine dining in town, Upscale, beautifully plated vegan Vietnamese dishes

Take scooter to Hue 9AM on 3/12- pickup at hotel | Easy Rider From Hue Da Nang Hoi An Via Hai Van Pass With Mister T

Mar 12, 2026 • 9:00 AM
 x 2 adults

raw_lines: arrive by bus | to Central Backpackers Hostel Phong Nha 12GO27634922
0.75 mile walk into town from bus drop off to hotel:
Staying at Phong Nha Coco Riverside
World-famous caves (Paradise Cave, Dark Caves, Phong Nha Cave by boat)
Best for: hiking, caves, nature photographers, silence
The Pub with Cold Beer - a whole experience, can swim there and float- leave about 4 hours
Departs Dong Hoi station at midnight arrives Ninh Binh 9:04am, be 30 min early (12:10 departure)
Tickets purchased - Confirmation through Baolau- F745F4

raw_lines: Stay: | Tam Cốc Garden-style ecolodges (boutique, tranquil, rice fields) | Trang An valley homestays with bungalows

Row to Trang An | quieter, dramatic caves, UNESCO-protected | 7-9am ideal time, buy ticket at Trang An wharf- will be pared with a boat and 2 other people. 3 hours long (get before 10am) https://muave.disantrangan.vn/home/en. People say route 3 with the Dot cave and steps is the best one (though skull island is hokey) or route 2 is the middle, balanced tour

to_do: Row to Trang An | quieter, dramatic caves, UNESCO-protected | 7-9am ideal time, buy ticket at Trang An wharf- will be pared with a boat and 2 other people. 3 hours long (get before 10am) https://muave.disantrangan.vn/home/en. raw_lines: Buy baskets, silk, etc from markets
Old Quarter (Sword Lake, Bach Ma Temple, Memorial House, food tour)
Ho Chi Minh Memorial Complex (mausoleum,house on stilts, one pillar pagoda, Temple of literature)
Hanoi Train Street (can get an egg coffee and wait for the train)
Thang Long Water Puppet Theatre | book before
Sit and have a beer and watch the train roll thru | Downtown Hanoi
West Lake (Tran Quoc pagoda, Quan Thanh Temple, Tran Quoc Temple)
Famous for egg coffee | Giang Cafe (supposed to be the best)
bia hơi corner (the intersection between Ta Hien and Luong Ngoc Quyen) | street food vendors
Use https://www.grab.com/-- uber to get around
